rationale: The US-Iran deal continues to develop with ongoing negotiations and market effects; oil prices falling is a mild positive for American consumers, but this remains a continuation of an established trend.

top_events.title: Oil prices fall and shares jump after US-Iran deal announced
top_events.summary: Continued oil price decline and equity market gains from the US-Iran deal provide modest economic relief for American consumers and investors, though this is an ongoing trend.

top_events.title: Trump hails MoU with Iran despite misgivings from some Republicans
top_events.summary: Trump's endorsement of the Iran MoU amid Republican pushback is rhetoric-level domestic politics; no new enacted policy change confirmed this cycle.

top_events.title: China arrests US academic at conference for 'espionage activities'
top_events.summary: Another US academic detained by China continues an established pattern of US-China tensions; no new qualitative escalation beyond prior baseline.
